info.description: Social media link with custom image and URL

platform.description: Name of the social platform (e.g., Facebook, Instagram, etc.)

url.description: URL link to the social media profile

image.description: Icon/image for the social media platform

altText.description: Alternative text for the image (for accessibility)

isActive.description: Whether this social link should be displayed

sortOrder.description: Order in which this social link appears
